title: @codewithimanshu: Software engineering student. 21 years old. Lives in a dorm in Ankara. Spent one month writing code. First night the bot
summary: @codewithimanshu: Software engineering student. 21 years old. Lives in a dorm in Ankara. Spent one month writing code. First night the bot
whyItMatters: Software engineering student. 21 years old. Lives in a dorm in Ankara. Spent one month writing code. First night the bot ran: $14,000 profit. He sat there staring at the screen. Refreshed twice. The number did not change. It actually worked. He explained the setup to me. Simpler than I expected. Three tools: OpenAI Codex Claude Opus 4.7 Polymarket CLOB API…
